summary: Tested RM motivation features: (1) Landing page Top Performers section with #1 card elevated with gold border, crown icon, sparkles, lg:scale-[1.04]; (2) RM Dashboard shows Top Performer banner with rank/stats, Share Achievement button toggles shareable card with download option; (3) Booking flow RM selection cards show '#X This Month' badges for all top 3 performers. All features working correctly.

issues: Console warning: DialogContent requires DialogTitle for accessibility (Radix UI)

critical_code_review_comments: Landing page #1 card correctly has: gold border (border-[#C7A14A]), ring (ring-2 ring-[#C7A14A]/20), Crown icon in badge, Sparkles icon near photo, lg:scale-[1.04] scaling
RM Dashboard banner fetches /api/rms/top-performers and checks if logged-in RM is in top 3 by user_id match
Shareable achievement card uses html2canvas for download functionality
EnquiryForm correctly fetches top performers and builds topPerformerIds map {user_id: rank} to show badges
All data-testids properly implemented: top-performer-banner, share-achievement-btn, shareable-achievement-card, download-achievement-btn, rm-top-performer-badge-{user_id}

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI features working: landing page, RM dashboard, booking flow)

context_for_next_testing_agent: RM motivation features fully tested. Top performer Rahul Sharma (user_f525f2bd774a) is #1 with 4 events closed, 22 leads. Amit Kumar is #2, Priya Singh is #3. Key test IDs for booking flow: rm-top-performer-badge-{user_id}. RM dashboard banner shows for RMs in top 3 only.
